title: The Elemental Masters
description: An Avatar: The Last Airbender modpack
body:
A Modpack that uses the Elementals Mod by Saparate and many other mods. 

The main feature of this modpack is as a modpack for survival, whether that is by yourself, with friends, or in a server with various different people. This modpack can be used for a server.

The Modpack as of 1.0 contains the following mods:
- Xaero's Minimap
- Better Combat
- Cloth Config API
- Sodium
- ToroHealth Damage Indicator (Updated)
- Better Mob Combat
- Xaero's World Map
- Fabric API
- Comforts
- Elementals
- PlayerAnimator
- Just Enough Items
- Mob Player Animator

I hope you enjoy the modpack.
